policy_interface.act: act(policy, obs: dict, task: dict) -> np.ndarray[action_horizon, action_dim]
policy_interface.commit_steps: optional commit_steps(policy, task: dict, action_chunk: np.ndarray, default_commit_steps: int) -> int

train_contract.base_policy: robocasa_stand_mixer_base nonzero learned temporal chunk BC warm start
train_contract.base_policy_note: Current promoted A100 artifact scored 2/10 and was trained with an eval-included diagnostic split; use as a posttraining warm start, not as a fair standalone submission.
train_contract.pretrained_reward_model_note: Reward/progress model trained from successful and failed StandMixer trajectories; train.py uses it to assign offline trajectory advantages when available.
